subject: feat(icons): harden APP_ICONS — 400 DPI + apple-touch-icon + favicon.ico
body:
Sharp now rasterizes the source SVG at 400 DPI before downscaling, so
every PNG (especially the 48px favicon, 180px Apple touch icon, and
192px PWA icon) is anti-aliased from a high-res source instead of the
default 72. The SVG also gains shape-rendering="geometricPrecision"
per the pattern doc so the rasterizer prioritises geometry accuracy.

New outputs:
- apple-touch-icon.png (180×180) — iOS home-screen icon, wired up via
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon"> in index.html.
- favicon.ico (16/32/48 multi-size) — Windows taskbar pinning + older
  browsers, packed inline in the script (no png-to-ico dependency)
  using the standard ICO directory format.

Manifest icons (192/512/maskable-512/1024) keep their current
purpose values; only their DPI improves.

Tags: pwa, icons, build
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
title: harden APP_ICONS — 400 DPI + apple-touch-icon + favicon.ico
